name: S-Force Professor DiGamma
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｓ－Ｆｏｒｃｅ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>セキュリティ・フォース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> プロフェッサー・<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ϝ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディガンマ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Each of your opponent's monsters in the same column as one of your "S-Force" monsters cannot change its battle position. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; change its battle position. You can only use this effect of "S-Force Professor DiGamma" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Each of your opponent's monsters in the same column as one of your "S-Force" monsters cannot change its battle position. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; change its battle position. You can only use this effect of "S-Force Professor DiGamma" once per turn.
